creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 236693
portstree patch for update

Upstream changes since last ports version 6.18.9:

- readme: mention "app password" for gmail
- #122: Inappropriate error message for external password command
- #125: exclude files ending in .json if no --rcfile
- #131: Update getmailrc-examples
- #132: forward to corrupted_message on encoding problems
